_comment: G8 Phase C fixture #4. pnpm workspace with three packages: ui (component library), app (consumer), utils (helpers). Prompt asks Claude to add a <RetryButton> component to the ui package. Tests intent-router picks frontend ONLY (no backend, no QA polyglot detection drift) and that the doc-only fast path doesn't fire (the change is real component code).
name: monorepo-frontend-only-fixture
description: G8 Phase C: pnpm workspace fixture (ui + app + utils) — scoped frontend-only change
